name: Greedy Goose
short_description: You play as a brave goose who has decided to embark on an exciting journey. Your goal is to reach the end of the level, collecting as many coins as possible.
detailed_description:
You play as a brave goose who has decided to embark on an exciting journey. Your goal is to reach the end of the level, collecting as many coins as possible.

But there are several obstacles in your way:

Roads: Busy roads await you, with cars speeding along them. You need to carefully cross the road to avoid getting hit.
Floating logs: The goose can't swim, but luckily there are floating logs for him to use. Stand on them to cross rivers and lakes.
Coins: Along your journey, you will find coins. Collect them to increase your score.

Good luck in this thrilling adventure.
